title: Only Create
description: A good collection of mods, consisting of "Create" mods and good additional mods that will improve the gameplay in the Minecraft game.
body:
A great day to play the "Only-create" modpack, where you will find the Create mod and its various add-ons.

That's right, you understood correctly! This modpack is built around the Create mod, focusing on it and unlocking new possibilities with Create!

The modpack also includes additional mods that are not related to Create. These mods enhance the gameplay and add their own mechanics to the game.

The modpack is well-optimized and excellent for playing with the Create mod!

modpackmodpack features **350+** mods, and the majority of them are Create add-ons!
```
System Requirements

· RAM (Memory): 6-8 GB minimum. 8 GB or more is recommended for optimal performance.
· Graphics Card: Must support OpenGL 4.5 and Shader Model 4.5.
· Java: Version 21 or newer is required.
```
Need Help?
If you encounter any issues,please don't hesitate to contact us. Send a detailed description of the problem and your game log files to: leha7cool.error@gmail.com
